title: Gooey Garlic Peruvian Pilaf
description: A crowd-pleasing garlic-rich Peruvian dish with a gooey texture and reduced garlic sauce for a paleo-friendly option.

ingredients.name: Pepper
ingredients.notes: Freshly ground or ready-made, black pepper is not recommended for paleo diet

ingredients.name: Tomato Sauce (Al dente)
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's cooked al dente to avoid excess liquid

instructions: In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and onion, sauté for about 5 minutes until fragrant.
Stir in the penne pasta and salt, cook for another minute.
Pour in the tomato sauce, reduce to thicken. Simmer gently while stirring occasionally.
Simmer for about 10-15 minutes or until most of the liquid is absorbed.
Taste, adjust seasoning if needed. Stir lightly before serving.
